title: AVM - Advanced VeinMiner
description: A mod that makes mining easier
body:
# Why is it advanced?
Why do I call it advanced? Because it offers more features than other VeinMiner mods. AVM supports enchants like Fortune or Silk Touch, and it works with pickaxes from other mods.

## Support 
This mod is 1.18.2 exclusive. I will not update this mod for newer versions, the main reason for that is because I don't have much time, but if you do, feel free to update it.

### Current features:
- Supports all vanilla pickaxes and ores.
- XP system.
- Support all forge ores.
- Support all forge pickaxes.
- Fortune enchant
- Silk Touch enchant

### Coming Soon:

- For more features, dm me on discord, my name is: maestro7576
